index.howToSectionTitle: How to Use the Facebook Video Downloader
index.howToContent:
Step 1: Copy the Facebook video link

Open Facebook, find the video, tap Share, and select “Copy Link.”

  • The URL is now on your clipboard.

Step 2: Paste the link into the downloader

Return to this page and paste the full URL into the input box.

  • Make sure the link isn’t cut off — the tool detects it automatically.

Step 3: Click the Download button

The system processes your video and soon displays the available quality options.

  • For longer videos, give it a few extra seconds before choosing.

Step 4: Choose your video quality (HD or SD)

Pick 1080p or 720p for HD, or SD for a smaller file size.

  • You can select MP4 for video, or MP3 if you only need the audio track.
index.howToHiddenContent:
Step 5: Save the video to your device

Tap your chosen download option and the file saves automatically.

  • On mobile, check your Gallery or Downloads folder.
  • On desktop, look in your browser’s Downloads folder.

Tip: If you plan to edit the video later, grab the highest resolution MP4 available.

Safe & Secure Downloading

No login is required for public videos. Your link is processed temporarily on secure servers and removed immediately afterward.

  • Private or restricted videos may need extra steps to access.

Fast & Reliable Downloads

  • Processing time depends on file size, but most downloads are ready within seconds.
  • The tool works across all major browsers and devices, handling regular posts, reels, and stories.

Important Tips

  • Double-check that your Facebook video link is complete before pasting.
  • For private videos, make sure you can view them in your browser first.
  • Live videos can only be downloaded after the broadcast has ended.

Why Use Our Facebook Video Downloader?

  • Download in HD, Full HD, or the best available quality.
  • No app installation needed — entirely browser-based.
  • Supports Facebook posts, reels, and stories.
  • Free, unlimited, and private.

Start Downloading Now

  • Only download videos you own or have permission to use.
  • No login required — your privacy stays fully protected.

faqs.q: Q1. Is it free and legal to download Facebook videos?
faqs.a: Our tool is 100% free and works in any browser. Copyright laws differ by country, so avoid using downloaded content for commercial purposes unless you have the creator’s permission.

faqs.q: Q2. Do I need to install an app or software?
faqs.a: Not at all. It’s browser-based and runs on Chrome, Safari, Firefox, and others — on both desktop and mobile.

faqs.q: Q3. How do I download Facebook videos on mobile?
faqs.a: Copy the video link (Share → Copy Link), paste it into the field, pick your preferred quality (MP4 or MP3), and tap Download. If the “Copy Link” option doesn’t appear, open the post in a new tab to get the URL.

faqs.q: Q4. Can I download in Full HD (1080p or 4K)?
faqs.a: Absolutely. The downloader grabs the highest quality available from the original upload, which can be 1080p or even 4K. Larger files naturally take a bit longer.

faqs.q: Q5. Can I download Facebook Reels, Stories, or Live videos?
faqs.a: Public reels and stories follow the same process. Live videos become downloadable only after the broadcast finishes and the post is made public.

faqs.q: Q6. Can I download private Facebook videos?
faqs.a: Only if you can already view the video in your browser. Our tool doesn’t bypass Facebook’s privacy settings.

faqs.q: Q7. Will the downloaded video have a watermark?
faqs.a: We don’t add any watermarks. You get the original file as uploaded. If a creator added their own branding, it stays — but we leave the video untouched.

faqs.q: Q8. Can I convert a Facebook video to MP3?
faqs.a: Yes. Choose the MP3 option after the link is processed, and the audio track will be extracted, compatible with virtually any media player.

faqs.q: Q9. Where do downloaded videos get saved?
faqs.a: On mobile, they usually land in the Downloads folder or Photos/Gallery app. On desktop, they go to your browser’s default download location.

faqs.q: Q10. Is my data safe? Why do some videos fail to download?
faqs.a: We never ask for login or collect personal data — only the URL is processed. If a download fails, check that the link is correct and the video isn’t private or deleted. Regional access restrictions can occasionally cause trouble.

index.seoArticle:
Saving Facebook videos used to be complicated. Now it takes about ten seconds.

Whether you want an educational clip, a funny friend-shared video, or a trending reel, this downloader lets you save it directly to your device in HD, with no watermarks and no sign-ups.

Speed is at the core. Most downloads are ready in moments, even for HD and Full HD files.

You can grab videos, reels, and stories in up to 4K where possible, and the process is just as smooth on your phone as on a laptop.

There’s no app to install, no account to create, and no limit on how many you can download.

Why People Download Facebook Videos

There are plenty of reasons to save a video.

Maybe you want to watch a tutorial later without using mobile data.

Or you’ve stumbled upon a recipe that’s easier to follow from your gallery.

Some users archive their own memories from Facebook — travel clips, family moments, or creative projects.

For educators, saving short explainer videos makes it easy to share with students offline.

And let’s be honest: sometimes you just want to keep a hilarious video before it vanishes from your feed.

Supported Video Types: From 360p to 4K

Our downloader handles all common Facebook formats.

Download regular feed videos, Facebook Reels, Stories, and even live recordings after the stream ends.

Quality options automatically show what the original supports — select 1080p for crisp Full HD, 720p as a balanced choice, or lower resolutions if you need a smaller file.

When the source was uploaded in 2K or 4K, those higher resolutions appear automatically.

And if you only need the sound, just pick the MP3 / audio track.

Common Download Issues & Simple Solutions

Occasionally a download doesn’t start right away.

The most common fix is checking the link: is it complete and from a public post?

If the video is private, you’ll need to be logged into Facebook and able to view it in your browser first.

Regional restrictions or deleted videos cause problems too. If all seems correct but it still fails, wait a moment and try again — temporary network hiccups happen.

The good news: the tool doesn’t store or cache anything, so your privacy is never at risk during troubleshooting.

Benefits of Offline Viewing

Having videos saved offline gives you total freedom.

Watch them on a plane, in a subway, or anywhere with spotty internet.

Use them in presentations, edit them later, or simply build a personal collection of useful content.

And because no watermarks are added, the files stay clean — ready to use however you like, as long as you respect the creator’s rights.

What makes this tool different?

It never demands a login, never stamps your files with watermarks, delivers HD all the way up to 4K, and works across Android, iPhone, Windows, and Mac.

The whole experience is private — no tracking, no stored data.

And we’re a small team of developers who simply believe that downloading your own Facebook videos should be fast, free, and frictionless.

Our focus stays on performance, simplicity, and respecting your time.

Ready to give it a try? Just paste your link and your video is seconds away.

about.content:
About Our Facebook Video Downloader — Fast, Reliable & Completely Free

Welcome to media.net. We built this platform with one straightforward aim: give everyone a simple, fast, and trustworthy way to download Facebook videos, reels, and stories — without watermarks, without logging in, and without unnecessary complications.

Why We Created This Tool

Like many people, we often found ourselves wanting to save a Facebook video to watch later — maybe a tutorial while commuting, a travel clip from a friend, or a recipe that’s easier to follow from your gallery.

But the existing solutions were frustrating: slow, filled with ads, demanding signups, or reducing video quality. We’re a small team of developers who simply believed downloading a publicly available video should be effortless and private.

So we built this downloader from the ground up with speed, simplicity, and trust at its core. Millions of videos are shared on Facebook every day. Maybe it’s a tutorial you want to rewatch offline, a reel from a creator you enjoy, or a clip you’d like to show someone who isn’t on Facebook.

Our tool makes saving that content instant and effortless.

Our Mission

We believe downloading videos should be easy, free, and private. No signup walls. No paid tiers. No frustrating limits. Many platforms make you register, verify your email, or pay for “premium” features just to do a basic download — we removed all of that.

Our downloader is unlimited: save as many videos as you want, whenever you want.

What Makes Our Platform Different

Plenty of downloaders exist online, but most are slow, full of ads, or quietly reduce your video quality. Some even stamp a watermark on your file. We took a different route.

  • With our tool you get fast processing — most links are ready within seconds — and there’s no login or signup, ever.
  • Quality reaches HD, 1080p, 2K, and 4K, depending on the original.
  • No watermarks are added to any download, and you enjoy a clean, smooth experience on every device.

Our focus stays on performance, simplicity, and user privacy — that’s why people keep coming back.

Privacy & Security — Your Data Stays Yours

We take privacy seriously. When you use our downloader, you never need to share your name, email address, or any personal information.

  • No account registration is required.
  • No personal data is collected or stored.
  • No tracking of your download history.

All link processing is temporary — data is discarded immediately after your download. Every session stays completely private.

High-Quality Downloads, Every Time

We don’t compress or alter your files. What you download is exactly what was uploaded, in the best quality available.

  • Options include 720p (HD), 1080p (Full HD), 2K, and 4K when the original supports it.

Each download preserves the original quality — no compression, no degradation, no watermark.

Works on Every Device — No App Needed

There’s nothing to install. The platform runs entirely through your browser, on Android smartphones, iPhones, Windows computers, and Macs.

Whether you’re on a bus with your phone or at home on a desktop, the experience is fast, clean, and simple.

Unlimited Downloads, No Waiting

Speed counts. Our servers are tuned to deliver high-quality videos quickly, with no queues.

  • No download caps.
  • No waiting between downloads.
  • No throttling.

Save one video or twenty — the system handles it without a hiccup.

More Than Just Videos

The tool goes beyond standard Facebook posts. You can download regular videos, Facebook Reels, Stories, and public live recordings after the broadcast ends.

Everything in one place, no switching between different sites.

A Clean Interface Built for Real People

We intentionally kept the design simple. No confusing menus, no overwhelming options, no popup traps. Just a clean page with a clear input field and a download button.

Pages load fast on any connection, and the experience is intuitive — if you’ve never used a video downloader, you’ll get it in about thirty seconds.

Why People Trust Our Facebook Video Downloader

To sum it up: fast, unlimited downloads; completely free — no fees or subscriptions; no login required; HD video quality without watermarks; works on mobile and desktop without installing anything; private and secure by design.

Our Vision Going Forward

We’re always improving — faster processing, broader format support, a better mobile experience. Our goal is to be the most trusted Facebook video downloader online, and we get there by keeping things simple and genuinely useful.

Ready to Start?

If you want a reliable downloader that just works, you’ve found it. Paste your link on the home page and get your video in seconds. No fuss. No login. No watermarks.

Just your video, downloaded.

privacy.content:
Privacy Policy – Facebook Video Downloader HD

Last Updated: April 21, 2026

Welcome to our platform. We deeply value the privacy and security of our users. This Privacy Policy document contains detailed information regarding the types of data that are collected, how we process it, and how we protect your privacy when you use our Facebook video downloader HD tool. By accessing or using our free FB video downloader online, you agree to the terms outlined in this Privacy Policy.

1. Legal Disclaimer: No Affiliation with Meta Platforms, Inc.

We want to make it absolutely clear that our platform operates strictly as an independent, third-party utility tool. We are NOT affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected with Meta Platforms, Inc., Facebook, Instagram, Threads, or any of their subsidiaries or affiliates. The official Facebook website can be found at facebook.com. The names Facebook, Instagram, Threads, as well as related names, marks, emblems, and images are registered trademarks of their respective owners. Our secure Facebook video downloader without login is created solely to help users download publicly available videos for personal and offline viewing.

2. Information We Do NOT Collect

We take pride in offering a highly secure environment. When you use our tool to download Facebook videos free, you do so completely anonymously.

  • No Login Required: We provide a secure Facebook video downloader without login. We never ask for your email, passwords, or personal identity.
  • No Tracking: We do not track your personal download history or monitor which specific Facebook reels or stories you are saving.
  • No Stored Files: We act only as a bridge. The files you download (whether 1080p MP4 or MP3) are sent directly from the source to your device. We do not host, store, or archive pirated or downloaded videos on our own servers.

3. How We Process Facebook Video Downloads

When you paste a link into our search box to download Facebook videos on mobile without app or on PC, our servers temporarily process the URL to extract the direct media link from Facebook's servers. Once the download link is generated and sent to your browser for a Facebook video download without watermark, the temporary request data is immediately discarded. We do not keep logs of the videos you fetch.

4. Log Data and Analytics

Like almost all professional websites, we utilize standard log files and basic analytics to understand general website traffic and improve user experience. This may include:

  • Internet Protocol (IP) addresses (anonymized where possible)
  • Browser type and device type (e.g., Mobile, Desktop)
  • Date and time stamps of visits
  • Referring and exit pages

These logs are strictly used for analyzing trends, administering the site, and ensuring server stability. None of this data is linked to any information that is personally identifiable. Your identity remains 100% private while using our private Facebook video downloader.

5. Cookies and Web Beacons

To ensure a smooth and fast experience while you download FB videos free, our site may use "cookies". These cookies are small text files stored on your browser used to optimize our website's UI and speed. You can choose to disable cookies through your individual browser options, and doing so will not prevent you from using our Facebook reels downloader features.

6. Third-Party Advertisements and Links

To keep our Facebook video downloader HD tool 100% free with unlimited downloads, we may display third-party advertisements (such as Google AdSense). These third-party ad servers or ad networks may use technologies like cookies, JavaScript, or Web Beacons that are sent directly to your browser. They automatically receive your IP address when this occurs. Our privacy policy does not apply to, and we cannot control the activities of, such other advertisers or websites. We advise you to consult the respective Privacy Policies of these third-party ad servers for more detailed information.

7. Legal Use and Copyright Compliance

Our tool is designed to allow users to download Facebook videos on mobile without app or on PC for personal, fair-use, and offline viewing only. We do not encourage, support, or endorse the downloading of copyrighted material for commercial intent, distribution, or re-uploading without the explicit permission of the original content creator. Users are solely responsible for ensuring they have the legal right to download and use the media they fetch through our platform.

8. Security of Your Data

We understand users often wonder: "Is it safe to download Facebook videos?" Yes! We implement strict security measures, including SSL encryption (HTTPS), to ensure that your connection to our website is secure. Since we do not ask for personal details or payment information, the risk of data breaches regarding your personal identity is practically zero.

9. Children's Privacy

Our website is a general audience tool and does not knowingly collect any Personal Identifiable Information from children under the age of 13. If you think that your child provided this kind of information on our website, we strongly encourage you to contact us immediately and we will do our best efforts to promptly remove such information from our records.

10. GDPR Data Protection Rights

We would like to make sure you are fully aware of all of your data protection rights. Every user is entitled to the following under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):

  • The right to access: You have the right to request copies of your personal data.
  • The right to rectification: You have the right to request that we correct any information you believe is inaccurate.
  • The right to erasure: You have the right to request that we erase your personal data, under certain conditions.
  • The right to restrict processing: You have the right to request that we restrict the processing of your personal data.
  • The right to object to processing: You have the right to object to our processing of your personal data.
  • The right to data portability: You have the right to request that we transfer the data that we have collected to another organization, or directly to you.

If you make a request, we have one month to respond to you. However, please note that because we do not collect or store personal data, we generally do not hold any information that can be accessed, rectified, or erased under these requests.

11. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in legal requirements or our operational practices. We advise you to review this page periodically for any changes. Any modifications to this policy are effective immediately upon being posted on this page.

12. Contact Us

If you have any questions or require more information about our Privacy Policy, the legal nature of our Facebook video downloader HD, or any technical queries, do not hesitate to contact us at fbcostumer.service.net@gmail.com.

terms.content:
Terms & Conditions — Facebook Video Downloader HD

Last Updated: April 21, 2026

Welcome to media.net. By using our Facebook video downloader, you agree to these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully. If you disagree with any part, please stop using our service.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using our downloader, you confirm that you’ve read and understood these Terms along with our Privacy Policy. They apply to all users — visitors, casual users, and regulars alike.

We may update these terms at any time without prior notice. Continuing to use the service after an update means you accept the new terms. We recommend reviewing this page periodically.

2. No Affiliation with Meta Platforms or Facebook

Our platform is an independent, third-party service. We are NOT affiliated with, associated with, authorized by, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected to Meta Platforms, Inc., Facebook, Instagram, Threads, or any of their subsidiaries or affiliates.

Facebook and Instagram are registered trademarks of Meta Platforms, Inc. We claim no ownership or partnership. Our tool exists purely to give users a convenient way to download publicly available Facebook videos for personal, offline viewing.

We are not responsible for any action Meta or Facebook takes regarding user accounts or content.

3. What Our Service Does and How You May Use It

Our service extracts the direct download link from a Facebook video URL that you provide. The file then downloads directly from Facebook’s servers to your device.

Permitted Uses:

  • Downloading videos for personal, non-commercial use.
  • Saving educational or informational content for offline access.
  • Archiving your own content that you originally posted on Facebook.
  • Fair use purposes as defined under applicable copyright law.

Prohibited Uses:

  • Downloading copyrighted content without the copyright holder’s permission.
  • Re-uploading downloaded content to any platform without proper authorization.
  • Using downloaded content commercially or for profit.
  • Distributing, selling, or licensing downloaded content.
  • Violating any local, national, or international law.

4. Copyright Compliance and Fair Use

Most videos on Facebook are protected by copyright. You are solely responsible for ensuring your downloads comply with applicable copyright laws.

Downloading copyrighted material without permission may violate copyright law. Fair use exceptions vary by country and context. Always get permission from the content creator before downloading their work. We do not support copyright infringement in any form.

We strongly encourage you to only download content you created, content explicitly licensed for free use, or content for which you have explicit written permission.

5. We Don’t Store or Host Content

Our platform does not store, host, or archive any video files, images, or media on our servers. We are a technical bridge — we process the URL you provide, extract the direct download link from Facebook’s servers, and deliver it to your browser.

The download goes directly from Facebook to you. All temporary processing data is discarded immediately after your download is initiated. We never maintain copies of any downloaded video.

6. Your Responsibilities as a User

By using our service, you agree:

  • You are fully responsible for any content you download.
  • You have verified that you have the legal right to download and use the content.
  • You will not use our service to violate anyone’s rights.
  • You will comply with all applicable laws and regulations.
  • You will not misuse or abuse our service.
  • You accept full legal responsibility for any consequences arising from how you use downloaded content.

We provide this tool as a convenience. All legal responsibility for how you use it rests with you.

7. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, media.net and its operators are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from:

  • Your use or inability to use our service.
  • Unauthorized access to your device or data.
  • Errors or inaccuracies in our service.
  • Any legal action brought against you by third parties related to content you downloaded.
  • Actions taken by Facebook or Meta against your account.

We provide this service “as is” and “as available” — without warranties of any kind. We don’t guarantee the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or always available.

8. Privacy and Data Security

When you use our service, we don’t require any account or personal information, we don’t track your download history, we use SSL encryption to protect your connection, and we don’t sell, rent, or share any data with third parties.

For full details, see our Privacy Policy.

9. Service Availability and Changes

We aim for consistent uptime but don’t guarantee it. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service without notice; update features or technology; schedule maintenance that may temporarily affect availability; and refuse service to any user at our sole discretion.

We’re not liable for losses or inconvenience caused by service interruptions or changes.

10. Governing Law

This agreement is governed by the laws applicable in your jurisdiction. Any disputes related to the use of our service are subject to the jurisdiction of the appropriate courts. If any part of these terms is found invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain in full effect.

11. Contact Us

For questions or concerns about these Terms and Conditions:
Email: fbcostumer.service.net@gmail.com
We aim to respond to all legitimate inquiries within a reasonable timeframe.

12. Final Agreement

By continuing to use our Facebook video downloader, you confirm you’ve read and agreed to these Terms and Conditions in full.

Thank you for using our service responsibly. Always respect copyright law and the rights of the people who create the content you enjoy.

Changelog

  • April 21, 2026: Initial version of Terms & Conditions published.

(Future updates will be listed here with dates and changes.)
